title: Andre Yeap’s non-disclosure of conflict in MSA Global dispute vitiates arbitral award: Delhi High Court
description: The Delhi High Court on Friday refused to enforce a foreign arbitral award on the ground that arbitrator and Senior Counsel Andre Yeap failure to disclose his prior professional engagement by one of the parties violated the most basic notions of justice [MSA Global Vs Engineering Projects].Yeap, one of the three arbitrators in the arbitral tribunal, had failed to disclose a prior professional engagement involving Manbhupinder Singh Atwal, the promoter of MSA Global LLC (Oman) which was one of th
